tuning: E A D G B E
content:
He wasn't man enough - Toni Braxton

[Intro]
|[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]|

[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Dark child, oh yeah, yeah, Toni Braxton,[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]B7[/ch]
oh ha-ha, uh-huh, oh oh oh, yeah, uh uh, yeah, uh uh,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]B7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
darkchild, uh uh.[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Listen girl, who do you think I am?[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
Don't you know that he was my man?[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]
But I chose to let him go,[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
why do you act like I still care about him?[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
Looking at me like I'm hurt,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]B7[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
when I'm the one who said I didn't want it to work.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
Don't you forget I had him first?[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
What you thinkin'? Stop plaguing me.[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
He wasn't man enough for me.[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Am[/ch]
If you don't know, now here's your chance,[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
I've already had your man.[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
Do you wonder just where he's been, yeah?[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]B7[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Not be worried about him, now it's time you know the truth,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B7[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
I think he's just the man for you.[/tab]

What are you thinking?
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Do you know about us back them?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Do you know about your husband, girlfriend?[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm not thinking 'bout him, but you married him.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Do you know I made him leave?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Do you know he begged to stay with me?[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
He wasn't man enough for me.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
Listen girl, didn't he tell you the truth?[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
If not, then why don't you ask him?[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]                                   [ch]Em[/ch]
The maybe you can be more into him, instead of worrying about me.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
And hopefully you won't find[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
all of the reasons why his love didn't count,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B7[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
and why we couldn't work it out.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
What you thinkin'? Stop plaguing me.[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
He wasn't man enough for me.[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Am[/ch]
If you don't know, now here's your chance,[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
I've already had your man.[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
Do you wonder just where he's been, yeah?[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]B7[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Not be worried about him, now it's time you know the truth,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B7[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
I think he's just the man for you.[/tab]

What are you thinking?
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Do you know about us back them?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Do you know about your husband, girlfriend?[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm not thinking 'bout him, but you married him.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Do you know I made him leave?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Do you know he begged to stay with me?[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
He wasn't man enough for me.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]B7[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Oh yeah, so many reasons why our love is through, yeah.[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]B7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
What makes you think he'll be good to you?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]B7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
No, it makes no sense, 'cause he will never change,[/tab]

girl, you better recognize the game, oh yeah.[/tab]
